productDisplayName: Femella Women Multicolour Open Back Top
description: Style NoteA colour happy wardrobe updater is an essential this summer - this multicoloured top from femella is reminiscent of a bright watercolour painting. With a pretty mock placket at the back, this piece is a great add to your style arsenal.Product DetailsMulticoloured round neck top, has orange, yellow, pink and green tones, a mock three-button placket at the back that flows into an inverted box pleatMaterial and CareBlended fabricCold wash, dry inside outDo not wring or bleach Size and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
